## Feature PR Checklist

- [ ] This pull request targets this repository's `main` branch.
- [ ] This pull request was created from a `feature/<name>` branch.
- [ ] The dashboard change is small, clear, and related to the LMS template.
- [ ] At least one teammate reviewed this PR.
- [ ] The review includes at least one inline comment on a changed file.
- [ ] Any AI-assisted code was reviewed, cleaned up, understood, and tested.

## Notes For Reviewers

Describe the dashboard change and anything teammates should pay special
attention to before merging.
